title: Charred Mexican BBQ Beef Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican dish with tender beef, charred to perfection, served in a crispy taco shell.

ingredients.name: charred
ingredients.notes: tablespoons of charred onion and garlic

instructions: Season the beef with cumin, salt, and pepper.
Grill the beef for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F.
Transfer the beef to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the beef into thin strips and brush with charred onion and garlic.
Warm the taco shells according to the package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of the beef onto a taco shell, followed by a spoonful of barbeque sauce and a sprinkle of crunchy slaw.
